title: Counterargument and rebuttal
subtitle: Present the other side and answer it.
overview: A strong B2 argument includes a counterargument.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Sin embargo, eso no implica que...
However, that does not imply that...

items.es: Se podría argumentar que estudiar solo da más flexibilidad.
items.en: One could argue that studying alone gives more flexibility.

items.es: Es cierto que cada persona tiene su propio ritmo.
items.en: It is true that each person has his or her own pace.

items.es: Sin embargo, eso no implica que la interacción sea secundaria.
items.en: However, that does not imply that interaction is secondary.

items.es: Mi respuesta sería que la flexibilidad debe combinarse con práctica real.
items.en: My response would be that flexibility should be combined with real practice.

items.es: De lo contrario, se corre el riesgo de entender mucho y hablar poco.
items.en: Otherwise, one runs the risk of understanding a lot and speaking little.
